subtitle: A shared home for {datacenter} group details, runs, and activity.

leave_group_modal.title: Leave {name}?
leave_group_modal.description: You will lose member access to this group until you join again or receive a new invite.
leave_group_modal.warning: Any group-specific access, moderation privileges, and member-only dashboard actions will no longer be available after you leave.

hero.no_description: This group has not added a description yet. Use this space to clarify what you run, who it is for, and how people should approach joining.

upcoming_runs.title: Coming Up
upcoming_runs.subtitle: See what this group has lined up next.
upcoming_runs.empty_description: Once this group has future runs on the calendar, they will appear here in start-time order.

week_overview.title: This Week
week_overview.subtitle: A simple week-at-a-glance look at what is on the schedule.
week_overview.empty: No runs are scheduled for this week.

content.title: What This Group Runs
content.subtitle: See the kinds of content this group keeps coming back to, along with their history for each one.
content.visible_runs_hint: This reflects the run history visible to the current viewer, including the group's status mix.
content.library_hint: Grouped by the kinds of content this group has actually been running.

pipeline.title: Run Pipeline
pipeline.empty: No run data is available yet.

setup.title: Setup Health
setup.subtitle: Quick checks for the pieces that make the group feel established and easier to join.

members.title: Member Snapshot
members.subtitle: A quick read on who is around the table right now.
members.empty: No members are available to preview yet.
